| [[2010-09-01-polygonal-map-generation]] | Polygonal Map Generation for Games | article | en | procedural-generation, voronoi, map-generation, game-development | Amit Patel's guide to generating game maps using Voronoi polygons instead of square or hexagonal grids, covering the full pipeline from polygon generation to rendering. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[2015-07-07-noise-terrain-maps]] | Noise-Based Terrain Maps | article | en | procedural-generation, terrain, noise, game-development | Amit Patel's tutorial on using Perlin/Simplex noise functions to generate 2D terrain maps for games, covering elevation, biomes, climate, islands, and infinite terrain. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[2026-06-11-delaunay-voronoi-sphere]] | Delaunay+Voronoi on a Sphere | article | en | procedural-generation, voronoi, delaunay, sphere, planet-generation, computational-geometry | Amit Patel's technical guide to computing Delaunay triangulation and Voronoi regions on a sphere using stereographic projection, Fibonacci sphere points, and centroid alternatives. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[2026-06-11-hexagon-tiling-sphere]] | Hexagon Tiling of a Sphere | article | en | procedural-generation, sphere, hexagon-tiling, game-development, map-projection | Amit Patel's exploration of the challenges and possible solutions for wrapping hexagon tile maps on a sphere, including the twelve-pentagon problem and coordinate system workarounds. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[2026-06-11-mapgen2]] | Mapgen2 — Procedural Island Map Generator | article | en | procedural-generation, map-generation, voronoi, islands, game-development, red-blob-games | Amit Patel's Mapgen2 island map generator, designed for Realm of the Mad God, using Voronoi polygons with coast-distance elevation and simple biomes. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[2026-06-11-mapgen3]] | Mapgen3 — Abandoned Experiment | article | en | procedural-generation, map-generation, red-blob-games, postmortem | Amit Patel's abandoned Mapgen3 experiment — an attempt to simultaneously switch languages, data structures, and algorithms that failed due to changing too many variables at once. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[2026-06-11-procedural-face-generator]] | Procedural Face Generator | article | en | procedural-generation, computer-graphics, faces, parameterization, red-blob-games | Amit Patel's experimental procedural face generator using a five-dimensional hypercube parameter space for cartoon face expressions, inspired by Scott McCloud's Making Comics. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[2026-06-11-sdf-msdf-fonts]] | Guide to SDF+MSDF Fonts | article | en | font-rendering, signed-distance-fields, msdf, gpu-rendering, game-development | Amit Patel's comprehensive guide to Signed Distance Field (SDF) and Multi-channel Signed Distance Field (MSDF) font rendering for games and maps, with shader implementation details. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[2026-06-11-square-tiling-sphere]] | Square Tile Maps on a Sphere | article | en | procedural-generation, sphere, cube-mapping, map-projection, game-development, computational-geometry | Amit Patel's exploration of using a cube's six square faces as the basis for square tile maps on a sphere, covering gnomonic projection, area distortion, and coordinate systems for moving between cube faces. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[2026-06-11-terrain3d]] | terrain3d — Godot 3.5 Procedural 3D Terrain | article | en | procedural-generation, terrain, godot, lod, gdnative, cpp, infinite-worlds | A Godot 3.5 project implementing procedurally generated 3D terrain using GDNative and C++, with LOD terrain tiles stitched together at mesh boundaries. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[2026-06-11-wave-function-collapse]] | Wave Function Collapse / 波函数坍缩算法 | article | en | procedural-generation, constraint-satisfaction, texture-synthesis, algorithm | An overview of the Wave Function Collapse algorithm — a constraint-based texture synthesis method that generates locally similar outputs from example bitmaps, popularized by Maxim Gumin's reference implementation. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[2026-06-11-wfc-implementations-survey]] | WFC Implementations Survey / WFC 实现概览 | article | en | wfc, wave-function-collapse, procedural-generation, survey, implementations | A survey of 12 open-source Wave Function Collapse implementations spanning C#, C++, Rust, Python, Go, GDScript, and TypeScript, across Unity, Godot, and Bevy engines. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[amit-patel]] | Amit Patel | person | en | procedural-generation, game-development, red-blob-games, voronoi | Creator of Red Blob Games, author of Polygonal Map Generation for Games and influential tutorials on procedural map generation, pathfinding, and game algorithms. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[autolevel]] | AutoLevel | concept | en | wfc, wave-function-collapse, unity, procedural-generation, level-design, unity-editor | A free Unity editor-integrated WFC-based procedural level generator with weight, volume, and boundary constraints. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[biome-maps]] | Biome Maps | concept | en | procedural-generation, noise, biomes, terrain | A technique for assigning biomes using two independent noise maps — one for elevation and one for moisture — combined through a 2D lookup table. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[blue-noise-placement]] | Blue Noise Placement | concept | en | procedural-generation, noise, placement, blue-noise | A technique using high-frequency noise to place irregularly spaced objects like trees and rocks by detecting local maxima. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[boris-the-brave]] | Boris the Brave | person | en | procedural-generation, wfc, game-development | Creator of the DeBroglie WFC library, the chiseling method for generating connected structures, and adaptor of modifying-in-blocks for lazy infinite generation. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[chiseling-method]] | Chiseling Method | concept | en | procedural-generation, wfc, connectivity, algorithm | A method by Boris the Brave for generating connected structures with WFC by carving out (chiseling) the output from a solid block rather than building it up from tiles. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[chris-green]] | Chris Green | person | en | font-rendering, signed-distance-fields, valve, computer-graphics | Valve engineer who authored the seminal 2007 SIGGRAPH paper on using signed distance fields for real-time font rendering, widely adopted in game engines. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[chunk-based-generation]] | Chunk-Based Generation | concept | en | procedural-generation, chunks, world-generation | A world generation approach where the world is divided into rectangular tiles (chunks) that are generated independently on the fly. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[constrained-synthesis-wfc]] | Constrained Synthesis (WFC) | concept | en | procedural-generation, wfc, constraints, mixed-initiative | WFC's ability to incorporate user-specified constraints, enabling autocomplete-style mixed-initiative design where the algorithm fills in parts of a partially constructed output. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[constraint-propagation-ac4]] | AC-4 Constraint Propagation (WFC) | concept | en | procedural-generation, wfc, constraint-satisfaction, algorithm | The constraint propagation algorithm used in WFC's propagation phase, based on the AC-4 arc consistency algorithm by Mohr and Henderson (1986). | 2026-06-11 |
| [[contextual-generation]] | Contextual Generation | concept | en | procedural-generation, determinism, chunk-boundaries | Procedural generation where operations produce seamless results across chunk boundaries while remaining deterministic. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[convchain]] | ConvChain | concept | en | procedural-generation, texture-synthesis, algorithm | A related algorithm by Maxim Gumin that satisfies the strong version of condition C2 (exact pattern distribution matching) but does not guarantee C1 (only using input patterns). | 2026-06-11 |
| [[cube-sphere-projection]] | Cube-to-Sphere Projection | concept | en | procedural-generation, sphere, cube-mapping, map-projection, computational-geometry | A method for mapping a cube's surface onto a sphere by normalizing position vectors, used as a geometric foundation for square tile maps on spherical worlds. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[debroglie]] | DeBroglie | concept | en | wfc, wave-function-collapse, csharp, unity, procedural-generation, backtracking | A C# library implementing the Wave Function Collapse algorithm with backtracking support, non-local constraints, and 2D/3D/hex grid support. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[deterministic-generation]] | Deterministic Generation | concept | en | procedural-generation, determinism, reproducibility | The property that generating the same chunk always produces the same result, regardless of the order in which chunks are generated. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[downhill-river-generation]] | Downhill River Generation | concept | en | procedural-generation, rivers, hydrology, voronoi | A river generation technique where rivers start at random mountain corners and follow the steepest downhill slope through the Voronoi corner graph until reaching the ocean. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[dual-graph-representation]] | Dual Graph Map Representation | concept | en | procedural-generation, graph-theory, voronoi, map-representation | A map representation that stores both the Voronoi diagram (polygon shapes) and its dual Delaunay triangulation (polygon adjacency) together, enabling efficient switching between shape rendering and adjacency/pathfinding. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[effect-distance-and-padding]] | Effect Distance and Padding | concept | en | procedural-generation, padding, context, chunk-boundaries | The mechanism by which chunks receive context from neighboring areas through padded data requests to lower layers. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[elevation-from-coast-distance]] | Elevation from Coast Distance | concept | en | procedural-generation, elevation, terrain, voronoi | A terrain elevation model where elevation is defined as the distance from the coastline, producing monotonic elevation that increases inland with no local minima. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[elevation-redistribution]] | Elevation Redistribution | concept | en | procedural-generation, noise, terrain, elevation | Techniques for reshaping noise-based elevation values using mathematical functions to create specific terrain characteristics like flat valleys or terraced hills. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[entropy-heuristic-wfc]] | Minimal Entropy Heuristic (WFC) | concept | en | procedural-generation, wfc, heuristics, entropy | The observation heuristic used in WFC where the NxN region with the lowest Shannon entropy is selected for collapse, producing organic-looking results by mimicking human drawing behavior. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[fast-wfc]] | fast-wfc | concept | en | wfc, wave-function-collapse, cpp, performance, procedural-generation | A C++17 implementation of Wave Function Collapse focused on performance, achieving ~10x speedup over the original implementation. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[fibonacci-sphere]] | Fibonacci Sphere | concept | en | procedural-generation, sphere, point-distribution, algorithms, computational-geometry | An algorithm for distributing points approximately evenly on a sphere's surface using the Fibonacci sequence, with a spiral pattern that avoids clustering at poles. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[fractional-brownian-motion]] | Fractional Brownian Motion (FBM) | concept | en | procedural-generation, noise, fractals, terrain | A technique that sums noise at multiple octaves with decreasing amplitudes to produce fractal-like detail in terrain generation. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[functional-approach-procgen]] | Functional Approach to Procedural Generation | concept | en | procedural-generation, functional, sandbox | A procedural generation approach where content is generated as a spatially local function without knowledge of surroundings, common in sandbox games like Minecraft. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[ghx-proc-gen]] | ghx_proc_gen | concept | en | wfc, wave-function-collapse, rust, bevy, procedural-generation, model-synthesis | A Rust library for 2D & 3D procedural generation with Model Synthesis/WFC using AC-4 constraint propagation, available for the Bevy engine. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[graph-wave-function-collapse]] | Graph Wave Function Collapse (GWFC) | concept | en | wfc, wave-function-collapse, graph-algorithms, procedural-generation, python | An extension of Wave Function Collapse from grid structures to arbitrary graphs, using subgraph isomorphism (VF2) to extract and apply patterns. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[infinite-terrain]] | Infinite Terrain | concept | en | procedural-generation, terrain, infinite-worlds, noise | A locally-computed terrain generation technique where any position in an unbounded world can be generated on demand by offsetting noise coordinates by the camera position. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[internal-layer-levels]] | Internal Layer Levels | concept | en | procedural-generation, layering, architecture, layerprocgen | A concept where a single layer class implements multiple layers at once, each at a different level of detail or abstraction. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[island-shaping]] | Island Shaping | concept | en | procedural-generation, noise, terrain, islands | A technique for constraining noise-generated terrain to island shapes by combining noise elevation with a distance-based shaping function. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[layer-based-procedural-generation]] | Layer-Based Procedural Generation | concept | en | procedural-generation, architecture, layering | A methodology for procedural content generation where generation processes are divided into multiple layers with strict separation between input and output of each layer. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[layer-dependencies]] | Layer Dependencies | concept | en | procedural-generation, dependencies, architecture, layerprocgen | The mechanism in layer-based generation by which chunks in one layer request and receive data from other layers. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[layerprocgen]] | LayerProcGen | article | en | procedural-generation, unity, csharp, framework, infinite-worlds | A C# framework for layer-based infinite procedural generation that is deterministic, contextual, and multi-threaded, designed for Unity but usable in any C# engine. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[lloyd-relaxation]] | Lloyd Relaxation | concept | en | procedural-generation, algorithm, voronoi | An iterative algorithm that redistributes points to produce more evenly spaced Voronoi polygon centers, reducing the clumpiness of random point distributions. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[markov-junior-web]] | MarkovJuniorWeb | concept | en | wfc, markov-junior, typescript, webassembly, procedural-generation, probabilistic-programming | A browser-based TypeScript port of MarkovJunior with isometric rendering, .vox export, and experimental WebAssembly JIT compilation. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[markovjunior]] | MarkovJunior | concept | en | procedural-generation, wfc, 3d, algorithm | A 3D simple tiled model implementation by Maxim Gumin that extends WFC to three dimensions with extensive tilesets and examples. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[maxim-gumin]] | Maxim Gumin | person | en | procedural-generation, wfc, texture-synthesis, algorithm | Creator of the Wave Function Collapse reference implementation and related algorithms including ConvChain and MarkovJunior. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[model-synthesis]] | Model Synthesis | concept | en | procedural-generation, constraint-satisfaction, algorithm | Paul Merrell's 2009 algorithm for generating larger models from examples by deriving adjacency constraints between tiles and using AC-3 constraint propagation. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[modifying-in-blocks]] | Modifying in Blocks | concept | en | procedural-generation, wfc, lazy-generation, infinite-worlds | Paul Merrell's technique for generating unbounded tile configurations by incrementally modifying the model in blocks, adapted by Boris the Brave and Marian Kleineberg for lazy infinite WFC generation. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[multi-channel-distance-field]] | Multi-channel Distance Field (MSDF) | concept | en | font-rendering, signed-distance-fields, msdf, gpu-rendering | An improvement over single-channel SDF font rendering that uses three distance fields (RGB channels) to preserve sharp corners, addressing the rounded-corner limitation of single-channel SDF. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[noise-based-terrain-generation]] | Noise-Based Terrain Generation | concept | en | procedural-generation, terrain, noise, game-development | A methodology for generating 2D terrain maps using Perlin/Simplex noise as the primary building block, transformed through octave stacking, redistribution, and biome lookup. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[noisy-edges]] | Noisy Edges | concept | en | procedural-generation, rendering, voronoi | A rendering technique that replaces straight polygon borders with noisy, organic-looking lines constrained to quadrilateral regions defined by the dual graph, hiding the underlying polygon structure. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[observation-propagation-cycle]] | Observation-Propagation Cycle (WFC) | concept | en | procedural-generation, wfc, algorithm | The core loop of the Wave Function Collapse algorithm that alternates between collapsing uncertain regions into definite states and propagating the resulting constraint information through the output. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[oskar-stalberg]] | Oskar Stålberg | person | en | procedural-generation, wfc, game-development, townscaper | Creator of Townscaper and Bad North, known for pioneering WFC on irregular grids, combining WFC with marching cubes, and developing custom observation heuristics. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[overlapping-model-wfc]] | Overlapping Model (WFC) | concept | en | procedural-generation, texture-synthesis, wfc | A WFC mode where NxN pixel patterns are extracted from the input bitmap and used as the basis for superposition states, enabling synthesis directly from example images. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[owned-within-bounds]] | Owned Within Bounds | concept | en | procedural-generation, patterns, chunk-ownership | A pattern for disambiguating which chunk owns data that overlaps multiple chunk boundaries in procedural generation. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[planning-approach-procgen]] | Planning Approach to Procedural Generation | concept | en | procedural-generation, planning, top-down, design | A procedural generation approach where content is generated top-down with intent — planning connections, purpose, and meaning behind placed items. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[procedural-face-generation]] | Procedural Face Generation | concept | en | procedural-generation, computer-graphics, faces, parameterization | The algorithmic generation of cartoon faces from a parameter space, typically using a hypercube of control parameters for mouth shape, eyebrow position, and asymmetry. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[ridged-noise]] | Ridged Noise | concept | en | procedural-generation, noise, terrain, ridges | A noise variant that uses the absolute value of noise to create sharp ridge features, often used for mountain ranges. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[rolling-grid]] | Rolling Grid | concept | en | procedural-generation, data-structure, chunks, layerprocgen | A moving-grid data structure used by LayerProcGen layers to store and manage chunks as the generation focus moves through the world. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[rune-skovbo-johansen]] | Rune Skovbo Johansen | person | en | procedural-generation, game-development, unity | Creator of the LayerProcGen framework and indie game developer behind The Cluster and The Big Forest. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[signed-distance-field-fonts]] | Signed Distance Field Fonts | concept | en | font-rendering, signed-distance-fields, gpu-rendering, game-development | A font rendering technique that uses a signed distance field texture as an intermediate format between vector and bitmap fonts, enabling resolution-independent rendering with GPU-accelerated special effects. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[simple-tiled-model]] | Simple Tiled Model (WFC) | concept | en | procedural-generation, tiles, constraint-satisfaction, wfc | A WFC mode where tile adjacency constraints replace pixel pattern matching, enabling tile-based level generation with explicitly defined tile sets and symmetry classifications. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[spherical-voronoi]] | Spherical Voronoi Diagrams | concept | en | procedural-generation, voronoi, sphere, computational-geometry, planet-generation | Voronoi diagrams computed on a spherical surface, typically used for procedural planet generation. Can be computed via stereographic projection onto a plane for use with standard 2D Delaunay libraries. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[terrain-lod-stitching]] | Terrain LOD Stitching | concept | en | procedural-generation, terrain, lod, mesh, level-of-detail | A technique for stitching mesh boundaries between neighboring terrain tiles at different LOD levels to prevent visible seams and cracks in the terrain surface. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[tile-symmetry-system-wfc]] | Tile Symmetry System (WFC) | concept | en | procedural-generation, wfc, tiles, symmetry | A system classifying tiles by their symmetry type under the dihedral group D4, used to shorten adjacency enumeration in the simple tiled model. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[top-layer-dependencies]] | Top Layer Dependencies | concept | en | procedural-generation, dependencies, architecture, layerprocgen | Entry points for procedural generation — specifications that certain layer chunks are required within given world-space bounds. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[viktor-chlumsky]] | Viktor Chlumsky | person | en | font-rendering, signed-distance-fields, msdf, computer-graphics | Author of the msdfgen library and the 2016 paper on multi-channel distance fields (MSDF), providing the first complete open-source implementation of sharp-corner distance field font rendering. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[voronoi-diagram-mapgen]] | Voronoi Diagrams for Map Generation | concept | en | procedural-generation, voronoi, map-generation, geometry | Using Voronoi diagrams as the underlying geometric structure for procedural map generation, providing irregular polygon shapes instead of uniform tile grids. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[voronoi-island-generation]] | Voronoi Island Generation | concept | en | procedural-generation, islands, voronoi, geography | The process of defining coastlines and islands on a Voronoi polygon map by assigning land and water to corners, then propagating to polygons. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[wave-function-collapse]] | Wave Function Collapse (WFC) | concept | en | procedural-generation, constraint-satisfaction, texture-synthesis, algorithm | A constraint-based texture synthesis algorithm that generates outputs locally similar to an input bitmap by iteratively collapsing superposition states and propagating adjacency constraints. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[whittaker-diagram-biomes]] | Whittaker Diagram Biomes | concept | en | procedural-generation, biomes, geography, climate | A biome classification system that assigns biome types based on two axes: elevation (as a proxy for temperature) and moisture level, adapted for procedural map generation. | 2026-06-11 |
| [[wraparound-noise]] | Wraparound Noise | concept | en | procedural-generation, noise, wraparound, tiling, maps | Techniques for creating tileable noise maps using cylindrical (3D) or toroidal (4D) noise coordinate projections. | 2026-06-11 |
